title: A Completed Checklist
description: Get an additional advancement when you have completed all vanilla advancements!
body:
![The advancement visible in the Minecraft category](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c5e87a31c2529201d18fade381faa6072f41cf7.png)
This pack gives you the advancement "A Completed Checklist" when you have achieved all vanilla advancements!


- gives 30971 experience points, taking you straight to 100 levels if you have 1-22 levels to begin with
- is hidden until completion

Feel free to modify this datapack for personal use, but please do not publish any identical or modified versions without my consent.
